patch_history.raw: Run it Back Fixed a bug where Phoenix would remain nearsighted from certain abilities after respawning from Run it Back. v
Hot Hands Fixed an issue where throw animations would break if aiming straight down v
Hot Hands Fixed a bug where it would show inaccurate healing done in the combat report v
Fixed a bug where the wrong voiceline played during round-start when Phoenix & Tejo are both present. v
Blaze Fixed a bug that caused Phoenix’s Blaze minimap indicator to persist on the minimap for a couple seconds after the utility expired. v
Curveball Windup increased 0.5s >>> 0.6s v

all_changes.context_label: Curveball Windup increased

patch_history.raw: Blaze Fixed an issue where Blaze referenced a Harbor projectile asset for a few frames Fixed an issue where Blaze’s visual effects could be slightly offset v

Heating Up Phoenix now applies a Heal over time to himself whenever he touches his flames which persists even if he leaves the fire. patch_history.raw: Blaze Cost decreased 200 >>> 150 Now deals damage to all enemy objects Damage multiplier against specific enemy abilities set to 50% This is an undocumented change (see Health#Abilities) Hot Hands Now deals damage to all enemy objects Damage multiplier against specific enemy abilities set to 50% The correct functionality is undocumented, instead officially being documented as affecting any non-player object (see Health#Abilities) Run it Back Fixed an issue where Phoenix could not be decayed by Viper for a short period after dying during ult while decayed v

patch_history.raw: Run it Back Fixed a bug where Phoenix would not automatically re-equip a weapon on respawn v

Curveball Flash Max duration increased 1.1s >>> 1.5s Flash Windup decreased .7s >>> .5s Blaze Phoenix will now equip his weapon earlier if he stops bending his wall Run it Back Phoenix will now spawn at the marker with the amount of shields he had when the ability was cast v

patch_history.raw: Hot Hands The audio of the lingering fire zone will be easier to hear when other actions and sounds occur nearby v
Run it Back Fixed a bug where Phoenix’s starting location would briefly be displayed on the minimap after being killed in Run it Back v
Curveball The audio and visuals for Curveball should better indicate when to turn away, and when it's safe to look again v

Blaze Fixed nearsight not applying properly when going through Blaze Run it Back Fixed a bug where Phoenix could in rare cases begin to auto-defuse the Spike if he was defusing the Spike when Run it Back ended v
Run it Back Fixed a bug where Phoenix could plant the Spike off the bomb site if he finished planting after Run it Back ended This was a hotfix and was only listed in the Patch
notes v

patch_history.raw: Run it Back Fixed a bug where Phoenix would get teleported back to an ascender (rope ladder) after respawning, in cases where Phoenix died while Run It Back was active and he was attached to an ascender Fixed a bug where, for a brief time after Run it Back ended, Phoenix could be damaged in the place where he fizzled Console-only[] v
Blaze Can be set to Togglable in the Agent Profile Settings, allowing you to press and let go of the input to steer the ability freely while it’s active
